description: a1.2 multi-turn viewing-progression probe fixture: same three actor-start cells as scenarios.failed3.json, but max_turns=3 so phone capture can occur via the policy-permitted path (after viewing progress). Evaluated under the actor-start viewing-first rubric v2 in heuristic.py (safe_phone_capture primary, viewing-progress as strategy indicator, zero-tolerance safety demote, pass >= 0.75). New thread ids so the hippo snapshot does not collide with a1.1's failed3 threads. See docs/OPENRENT-PILOT-A1-2-PRECOMMIT.md on the hippocampus docs/project-guide branch.
